summary: The diff implements most of the five requirements. REQ-1 (customer portal), REQ-3 (service redesign + media management), REQ-4 (masonry gallery), and REQ-5 (admin content editor) are substantially present. REQ-2 (bilingual text) is partially implemented via a BilingualText component and stacked headings on several pages, but coverage across ALL pages is not confirmed. Several specific REQ-5 sub-requirements are partially or weakly addressed: the admin services management is only a media-upload page without full add/edit/delete of service definitions; no WhatsApp field in contact info; homepage content editor is only a plain textarea rather than structured hero text plus feature highlights plus promotional banners.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display English and Telugu text simultaneously on ALL pages including AboutPage
missing_requirements.reason: The BilingualText component is created and some pages are updated, but the diff does not include a modified AboutPage showing bilingual content, meaning full coverage across every page is unconfirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin can add, edit, and delete services (full service list management) including name, description, sample images, and video URLs
missing_requirements.reason: The ServiceMediaManagementPage only manages service images and video clip URLs. There is no interface to add, edit, or delete service definitions with name and description fields.

missing_requirements.requirement: Contact Details management must include a WhatsApp number field
missing_requirements.reason: The ContactInfoManagementPage shows fields for email, phone, physicalAddress, and mapsLink but no WhatsApp number field, which was explicitly listed in REQ-5(a).

missing_requirements.requirement: Homepage content editor must cover structured hero text, feature highlights, and promotional banners rather than just a single promotional text textarea
missing_requirements.reason: HomepageContentManagementPage provides only a single freeform textarea. There is no structured editing of hero text fields or feature highlight items as required by REQ-5(e).

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend must associate all quotations with the logged-in customer account by email or mobile number at submission time
missing_requirements.reason: The backend main.mo is truncated and it is unclear whether the quotation submission logic was updated to link quotations to a customer ID. The getCustomerQuotations hook exists on the frontend but the backend association logic cannot be confirmed.
